creator: ggg_mail@inbox.ru
text:
1.4.5_3 compiled with MTP support and libmtp 0.1.3 installed on the system I have an error when trying to connect to the device:

amarok: BEGIN: virtual bool MtpMediaDevice::openDevice(bool)
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/kde3/libamarok_mtp-mediadevice.so: Undefined symbol "LIBMTP_Init"

How-To-Repeat: Compile libmtp 0.1.3 (this is quite tricky though because there are bugs in the source code, but is possible), amarok 1.4.5_3 (enabling MTP support is also tricky due to a bug in configure script, you have to pass LIBMTP_CFLAGS and LIBS manually). Add an MTP device, then press "Connect".
